Transcrição Completa: 19 Section 8 3 - Building a Growth Culture
[00:00] Welcome back. Still in section 8, we're talking about building a growth culture.
[00:05] So now at this point, we talked about the deadly seven, the behaviors, the habits, the mindsets you can't do.
[00:12] We've now implemented on your one page attack and conquer plan your core values, what they mean to your organization, your actions, behaviors.
[00:20] Now it's time to bring that to life. And this is all about creating a growth environment.

[00:40] And that's what you were greeted with when you walked into our office because I wanted to bring to life my environment to trigger reminders on how to behave and how to act.

[01:25] You can see our core values on the wall there: creative, curious, fearless, strategic.

[01:43] And over in the corner here, we've got bombs hanging from the ceiling.
[01:47] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Dallas Office - Octopus Scene
NÚMEROS: Não especificado
VISUAL: Cena completa com polvos pendurados no teto, pirata, e polvos pintados na parede com aerógrafo. Design imersivo criando uma narrativa visual para clientes sobre como a empresa trabalha de forma abrangente.
[01:49] And then this is in the Dallas office as well. And this was an entire scene. I've got Octopi hanging from the ceiling, and I've got a pirate and I've got Octopi airbrushed on the wall.
[02:02] And this was all about when clients came through, we were telling them that we were like Octopi and we would literally get our tentacles into all of their business to ensure that nothing was missed, right?
[02:15] So, I was upselling and showing them and creating stickiness and also getting my people to think strategically using these visuals.
[02:24] So, with that being said, let's get into some video here. Turn it up on the laptop as you can.

[03:14] Even my conference rooms, you missed this. This office particularly had 18 conference rooms. Every one of them we had a it's an SQ1 war room with a grenade and then we had grenades on the conference tables just to reinforce that we are at war every day for our clients and that we lived our core value strategy.

NÚMEROS: Café da manhã e almoço diários fornecidos

[04:18] Treadmill desk. So in this office, we had treadmill desk, we had a yoga room, we had dogs, we brought in breakfast, lunch every day. We took care of our people.
[04:30] We created a culture that they believed in, they wanted to be a part of, and that allowed us to scale.
[04:36] We had a full bar. We had local kegs on staff, liquor, pingpong, foosball, pool tables.
[04:44] [música continua]
[04:50] Heat up here. Heat. Heat.
[04:55] [música continua]
[05:05] So that my friends is a growth environment at scale and again using the core values my office whether it was a 30 thousand, 35,000 square foot office in Dallas to you know a 15,000, 20,000 square foot in Portland to a 5,000 square foot office in Houston it all had continuity and told a story.
[05:28] So no matter where you are, could just be one person, you've got to start living these. How do you bring these out to life, right?
[05:36] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Sistema de Reconhecimento - Prêmios Core Values
NÚMEROS: $15 por prêmio, premiação mensal, 5-6 prêmios acumulados possíveis
VISUAL: Conceito de prêmios mensais usando estatuetas do Hulk de $15 da Amazon. Funcionários acumulam múltiplos prêmios em suas mesas, criando conversas com clientes e candidatos sobre os valores da empresa.
[05:38] We would create awards with our core values and we would have meetings and you know, every month somebody could win the Fearless award and we would literally go to Amazon and buy a $15 Incredible Hulk and they would have that for their desk.
[05:53] So now when people are walking around, they could have five or six hulks on their desk and the client would go, "What is that?" Well, it's fearless. Let me tell you what that means for you, Mr. Client.
[06:05] It's fearless. Prospective new team member, this is what it means. And this is what it feels like to be an SQer. Right?
[06:13] We created a culture, habits, behavior, mindset around four core values that we brought to life visually and we demonstrated and executed every day in order to scale.
[06:26] So take that away. Think now about, you know, your core values and with those core values, you know, what can you do to take them and bring them to life in your environment.
[06:38] And I'll see you in the next section.
📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO
NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:
Escritório Dallas: 30.000-35.000 pés quadrados
Escritório Portland: 15.000-20.000 pés quadrados
Escritório Houston: 5.000 pés quadrados
18 salas de conferência no escritório principal
4 core values implementados
Hulk de 12 pés de altura na entrada
Prêmios mensais de $15 por funcionário
Funcionários podiam acumular 5-6 prêmios em suas mesas
Escritórios classificados entre os mais criativos do mundo pela Mashable
ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:
Ambiente Imersivo: Cada core value representado fisicamente por personagens (Hulk=Fearless, Spider-Man=Creative, Yoda/Índio=Curious, Granadas=Strategic)
Sistema de Reconhecimento: Prêmios mensais com estatuetas de $15 que funcionários exibem em suas mesas
Narrativa Visual para Clientes: Polvos no teto e parede para explicar abordagem abrangente de trabalho
War Rooms Temáticas: 18 salas com granadas reforçando mentalidade de "guerra" pelos clientes
Amenidades Completas: Treadmill desks, sala de yoga, pet-friendly, café da manhã e almoço diários, bar completo, área de jogos
ESTRUTURA:
One Page Attack and Conquer Plan: Documento com core values, significados, ações e comportamentos
Core Values Universais: Creative, Curious, Fearless, Strategic - aplicados em todos os escritórios
Continuidade Visual: Mesma narrativa e tema em escritórios de tamanhos diferentes (Dallas, Portland, Houston)
Pontos de Contato: Entrada, salas de conferência, espaços comuns, mesas individuais - impossível evitar os valores
DADOS FINANCEIROS:
Investimento em prêmios: $15 por estatueta mensal
Investimento em ambiente: Decoração personalizada incluindo estátua de 12 pés, quadra de basquete, murais aerografados
ROI: Cultura permitiu escalar a empresa através de múltiplos escritórios mantendo consistência
CONCEITOS-CHAVE:
Growth Environment at Scale: Criar ambiente físico que reforce comportamentos desejados
Visual Triggers: Elementos visuais que lembram constantemente como agir e se comportar
Culture as Sales Tool: Usar o ambiente para vender para clientes e recrutar talentos
Living Core Values: Não apenas ter valores escritos, mas trazê-los à vida fisicamente
DURAÇÃO: 6:40 minutos FORMATO: Aula em vídeo com apresentação de slides e tour virtual pelo escritório
